content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves significantly to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible curving left, and the car appears to be on course near the center entering the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 24 + 5 = 29
Waypoint 29: (7.172473, 1.277033)
Car position: (6.532699, 0.770194)
Bearing = atan2(1.277033 - 0.770194, 7.172473 - 6.532699) = atan2(0.506839, 0.639774) = atan2(0.7922) ≈ 38.36°
Current heading: 14.818°
Delta = 38.36 - 14.818 = 23.54° → moderate-left turn needed

```json

    "Waypoints 0-21 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683",

  },

  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
